rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARCHIBALD D. BROWER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Demurrer By Shirley R. Feldman To Petitiion Of Gloria M. Draher For Evidentiary Hearing And Approval Of Creditor'S Claim And For Preference.
rulings.Rulings: As to the cause of action for Approval of Creditor's Claim - Tentative ruling: Overruled. 10 days leave to file an objection. As to the motion for preference - continued to 11/10/08 at 9:00 am by which point the creditor's claim should be at issue. Assuming that the creditor's claim is at issue by 11/10/08, the tentative ruling is that the motion for preference is granted. Further assuming that the creditor's claim is at issue by 11/10 and the motion for preference is granted, the Court will set the matter for trial and therefore appearances are required.
